SvDsoStoreIngestionPerformanceTest._comment_avg_item_time_ns: median*(1+ noise_margin + safety_margin) of last 30d. noise_margin=(p95-median)/median, safety_margin=10%. calculated on 2026-June-25
SvDsoStoreIngestionPerformanceTest._comment_total_time_ns: our hard max is 1h, but we set it to 10m based on the past data collected on 2026-June-25 to detect the trends earlier
